title: CERT-In flags 'high-severity risks' from AI-driven cyber threats amid Mythos concerns
summary: CERT-In has issued a high-severity warning about AI-driven cyber threats, noting that new tools make attacks faster, cheaper, and easier. Advanced AI can independently find vulnerabilities and execute complex attacks with minimal human intervention.
